home.title: Proof Exercises
home.createOrEditLabel: Create or edit a Proof Exercise

proofExercise.error: An error occurred while loading the proof exercise
proofExercise.selectNode: Click a node or drop a rule onto it
proofExercise.proofCompleteHint: Your derivation reaches the target expression.
proofExercise.derivationModeHint: Student writes the result expression; in inference mode the system applies the rule automatically.
proofExercise.allowVerificationHint: Show the "Verify Proof" button so students can check their steps.
proofExercise.onlyShowApplicableRulesHint: Hide rules that cannot be applied at the currently selected node.
proofExercise.partialCreditEnabledHint: Award proportional points for valid steps when the proof is incomplete. Requires at least one example derivation to determine the expected step count.
proofExercise.graderTypeHint: Step-by-step is the only grader available today. Lean / Isabelle / egg e-graph backends arrive in milestone 3.
proofExercise.goalModeHint: Transformation: students transform a source tree into a target tree. Equation: students reduce a single equation to a tautology (LHS structurally equals RHS).
proofExercise.goalExpressionHint: Proof is complete when this reduces to a tautology (e.g. t = t).
proofExercise.goalExpressionRequired: A goal expression is required for the workspace to appear. Typical shape is an equality with two non-trivial sides.
proofExercise.noRegressRejection: This step would return to a previously visited state.
proofExercise.acNormalizationHint: Treat + and · as commutative / associative for equality comparisons. Students don't have to apply commutativity / associativity rules explicitly to make trees match.
proofExercise.hintsTitle: Ask the grader for next-step suggestions ranked by progress toward the goal.
proofExercise.verifyReachabilityHint: Run the grader's automated reducer from source/goal — useful for sanity-checking that the exercise is solvable.
proofExercise.manualHintSelectBoth: ← Select a rule and click a node, then write the result
proofExercise.expressionsRequired: Both a source and a target expression are required for the derivation workspace to appear for students.
proofExercise.noExampleSolutions: No example solutions yet. Click "Add example solution" to add one.

builder.empty: No expression yet. Drag a block here or select a type and click Insert.
